[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@ofocus/sdk](./sdk.md) &gt; [BaseListQueryOptions](./sdk.baselistqueryoptions.md)

## BaseListQueryOptions interface

Options that apply to every list endpoint regardless of entity. Entity-specific predicate flags live on the per-entity option type (TaskQueryOptions, ProjectQueryOptions, etc.) which extends this.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface BaseListQueryOptions extends PaginationOptions 
```
**Extends:** [PaginationOptions](./sdk.paginationoptions.md)
